# Ken Baker

> Florida-based pastor, photographer, and cruise travel writer.

Ken Baker maintains three creative projects: [Flickers of Majesty](https://flickersofmajesty.com) (artistic photography), [Cruising in the Wake](https://cruisinginthewake.com) (cruise planning resources and ship reviews), and [Lakeview Fellowship Church](https://lakeviewfellowshipchurch.com) (a welcoming Florida church community in Hudson).

## About Ken
Ken holds a Bachelor of Arts in Biblical Studies from Trinity College of Florida and is completing his Master of Divinity at Southeastern Baptist Theological Seminary. He pastors a small church devoted to making family through the gospel of Jesus Christ, tends a flock of actual sheep, and captures God's creation through photography.

## Projects
- [Flickers of Majesty](https://flickersofmajesty.com): Artistic photography capturing divine light in creation
- [Cruising in the Wake](https://cruisinginthewake.com): Cruise planning, ship reviews, port guides, dining tips, accessibility advice
- [Lakeview Fellowship Church](https://lakeviewfellowshipchurch.com): Florida church community in Hudson — worship, events, family

## Contact
- Email: ken@flickersofmajesty.com
- Instagram: [@flickersofmajesty](https://www.instagram.com/flickersofmajesty/)
- Facebook: [Lakeview Fellowship Church](https://www.facebook.com/LakeviewFellowshipChurch/)
